subcodes.first_line: A mention from Our presence unto him who hath attained to the recognition of God, the Lord of all worlds. Thy letter hath reached Us, and We have answered thee in these days [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن فاز بعرفان الله رب العالمین قد حضر کتابک و اجبناک فی ایام
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @knowledge; recognition of God
